# Kultur- og likestillingsdepartementet

*33 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om Kulturrådet (kulturrådsloven)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.html) | Kulturrådsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2013-06-07-31) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) · [v2013](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2013/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2013-06-07-31.md) |
| [Lov om Likestillings- og diskrimineringsombudet og Diskrimineringsnemnda (diskri](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.html) | Diskrimineringsombudsloven – diskrol | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-50) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-50.md) |
| [Lov om Riksteatret [riksteaterlova]](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.html) | Riksteaterlova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1948-12-13-5) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1948-12-13-5.md) |
| [Lov om arkiv [arkivlova]](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.html) | Arkivlova – arkl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-12-04-126) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-12-04-126.md) |
| [Lov om avgift på offentlig framføring av utøvende kunstneres prestasjoner m.v.](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.html) | Lov om avgift til fond for utøvende kunstnere | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1956-12-14-4) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1956-12-14-4.md) |
| [Lov om avgift på omsetning av billedkunst m.m. (kunstavgiftsloven)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.html) | Kunstavgiftsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1948-11-04-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1948-11-04-1.md) |
| [Lov om avgift til Det norske komponistfond](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.html) | Lov om avgift til Det norske komponistfond | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1965-04-09-1) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1965-04-09-1.md) |
| [Lov om avleveringsplikt for allment tilgjengelege dokument (pliktavleveringslova](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.html) | Pliktavleveringslova – avlvl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1989-06-09-32) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1989-06-09-32.md) |
| [Lov om behandling av personopplysninger i Norges idrettsforbund og olympiske og ](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2025-06-20-95.html) | Lov om behandling av personopplysninger i Norges idrettsforbund mv | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-95) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-95.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-95.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-95.md) |
| [Lov om beskyttelse av mindreårige mot skadelige bildeprogram mv.](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.html) | Bildeprogramloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2015-02-06-7) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2015-02-06-7.md) |
| [Lov om bibliotekvederlag](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.html) | Bibliotekvederlagsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1987-05-29-23) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1987-05-29-23.md) |
| [Lov om dokumentasjon og arkiv (arkivlova)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2025-06-20-96.html) | Arkivlova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-20-96) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-20-96.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-20-96.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-20-96.md) |
| [Lov om endringar i lov 4. desember 1992 nr. 127 om kringkasting](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.html) | Endringslov til kringkastingsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2005-06-17-98) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2005-06-17-98.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i kringkastingsloven mv. (gjennomføring av endringsdirektiv til](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2025-02-28-2.html) | Endringslov til kringkastingsloven mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-02-28-2) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-02-28-2.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-02-28-2.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-02-28-2.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i pengespill- og lotterilovgivningen](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.html) | Endringslov til pengespill- og lotterilover | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-08-29-90) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) · [v2003](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2003/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-08-29-90.md) |
| [Lov om film og videogram](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.html) | Film- og videogramlova – filml | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1987-05-15-21) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1987-05-15-21.md) |
| [Lov om folkebibliotek (folkebibliotekloven)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.html) | Folkebibliotekloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1985-12-20-108) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1985-12-20-108.md) |
| [Lov om forbud mot prispåslag ved videresalg av billetter til kultur- og idrettsa](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.html) | Svartebørsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2007-06-29-86) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) · [v2007](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2007/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2007-06-29-86.md) |
| [Lov om kollektiv forvaltning av opphavsrett mv.](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2021-05-28-49.html) | Lov om kollektiv forvaltning av opphavsrett mv. | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-05-28-49) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-05-28-49.md) · [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2021/lover/lov-2021-05-28-49.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-05-28-49.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-05-28-49.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-05-28-49.md) |
| [Lov om kringkasting og audiovisuelle bestillingstjenester mv. (kringkastingslove](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.html) | Kringkastingsloven – kringkl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-12-04-127) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-12-04-127.md) |
| [Lov om likestilling og forbud mot diskriminering (likestillings- og diskrimineri](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.html) | Likestillings- og diskrimineringsloven – ldl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-51) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.md) · [v2017](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2017/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-51.md) |
| [Lov om offentlege styresmakters ansvar for kulturverksemd (kulturlova)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.html) | Kulturlova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2007-06-29-89) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) · [v2007](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2007/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2007-06-29-89.md) |
| [Lov om omsetning av bøker (bokloven)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2023-06-16-64.html) | Bokloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2023-06-16-64) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2023-06-16-64.md) · [v2023](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2023/lover/lov-2023-06-16-64.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2023-06-16-64.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2023-06-16-64.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2023-06-16-64.md) |
| [Lov om opphavsrett til åndsverk mv. (åndsverkloven)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.html) | Åndsverkloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2018-06-15-40) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.md) · [v2018](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2018/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2018-06-15-40.md) |
| [Lov om organisert kampaktivitet som tillater knockout [knockoutloven]](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.html) | Knockoutloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2001-06-15-73) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2001-06-15-73.md) |
| [Lov om pengespill (pengespilloven)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2022-03-18-12.html) | Pengespilloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2022-03-18-12) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2022-03-18-12.md) · [v2022](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2022/lover/lov-2022-03-18-12.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2022-03-18-12.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2022-03-18-12.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2022-03-18-12.md) |
| [Lov om redaksjonell uavhengighet og ansvar i redaktørstyrte journalistiske medie](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2020-05-29-59.html) | Medieansvarsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-05-29-59) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-05-29-59.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-05-29-59.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-05-29-59.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-05-29-59.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-05-29-59.md) |
| [Lov om register for frivillig virksomhet](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.html) | Frivillighetsregisterloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2007-06-29-88) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) · [v2007](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2007/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2007-06-29-88.md) |
| [Lov om språk (språklova)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2021-05-21-42.html) | Språklova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2021-05-21-42) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2021-05-21-42.md) · [v2021](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2021/lover/lov-2021-05-21-42.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2021-05-21-42.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2021-05-21-42.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2021-05-21-42.md) |
| [Lov om stadnamn (stadnamnlova)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.html) | Stadnamnlova – stadnl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1990-05-18-11) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1990-05-18-11.md) |
| [Lov om vederlag for visning av billedkunst og kunsthåndverk m.v.](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.html) | Lov om vederlag for kunstvisning | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1993-05-28-52) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) · [v2001](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2001/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) · [v2005](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2005/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) · [v2010](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2010/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) · [v2015](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2015/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1993-05-28-52.md) |
| [Lov om åpenhet om eierskap i medier](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.html) | Lov om åpenhet om eierskap i medier | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2016-06-17-64) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.md) · [v2016](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2016/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2016-06-17-64.md) |
| [Lov om økonomisk støtte til mediene (mediestøtteloven)](/norwegian-laws/lover/lov-2020-12-18-153.html) | Mediestøtteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2020-12-18-153) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2020-12-18-153.md) · [v2020](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2020/lover/lov-2020-12-18-153.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2020-12-18-153.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2020-12-18-153.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2020-12-18-153.md) |
